# Berne Appliance Repair

> Premium appliance repair company in South Florida. Same-day service across Miami-Dade, Broward, and Palm Beach. $59 flat service call, 18 full-time licensed technicians. DBAs: Berne Appliance Repair · Berne Repair.

## Key facts

- Phone: (754) 345-4515 — tel:+17543454515
- Email: BerneRepair@gmail.com
- Service call: $59 flat (free if repair approved — charged only if customer declines the repair)
- Hours: 7 days/week, 7 AM – 9 PM Eastern
- Warranty: 90-day labor & parts
- Founded: 2015 — Berne family of companies serving South Florida; premium "Berne Repair" division launched 2022
- Jobs completed: 29,300+ across the Berne family
- Rating: 4.79★ average / 871 reviews (multi-source aggregate)
- Owner: Eugene Berne (Eugene Bernitsky) — founder & CEO, https://eugenebernitsky.com/
- Credentials: FL DBPR licensed & insured; EPA Section 608 certified (sealed-system refrigerant work — the legal requirement for cold-plunge chillers, pool heat pumps, and Sub-Zero sealed systems)
- Service area: Miami-Dade County, Broward County, Palm Beach County (71 cities listed in /sitemap.xml)
- Languages: English, Spanish

## Luxury & wellness services (6)

Hand-authored specialty pages — the premium differentiator. EPA 608 sealed-system work, niche brands, technician-voice diagnostics.

- [Pool & Spa Heater Repair](https://www.berne-repair.com/services/pool-heater-repair) — gas and heat-pump; Pentair, Hayward, Raypak, Jandy, AquaCal; salt-air corrosion specialists
- [Cold Plunge & Ice-Bath Chiller Repair](https://www.berne-repair.com/services/cold-plunge-repair) — sealed-system refrigeration; Plunge, Renu Therapy, Blue Cube, Morozko Forge, Penguin Chillers
- [Electric Sauna Repair](https://www.berne-repair.com/services/electric-sauna-repair) — heater elements, controls, infrared panels
- [Built-in Coffee Machine Repair](https://www.berne-repair.com/services/coffee-machine-repair) — Miele, Jura, Thermador, Gaggenau plumbed espresso systems
- [Warming Drawer Repair](https://www.berne-repair.com/services/warming-drawer-repair) — Wolf, Thermador, Miele built-in warming drawers
- [Power Recliner & Luxury Seating Repair](https://www.berne-repair.com/services/recliner-repair) — motors, controls, power mechanisms

## Brands serviced

Premium: Sub-Zero, Wolf, Viking, Thermador, Miele, GE Monogram.
Standard: Bosch, KitchenAid, LG, Samsung, Whirlpool, GE, Maytag, Frigidaire, Electrolux, Jenn-Air, Speed Queen, Scotsman, U-Line, Marvel, and most other residential and commercial brands.

## Luxury positioning & costs

Berne Appliance Repair is a factory-trained, white-glove specialist for high-end and built-in appliances in South Florida — not a commodity appliance shop. The work centers on Sub-Zero, Wolf, Miele, Thermador, Viking, Gaggenau and Liebherr built-ins, including sealed-system refrigeration (EPA Section 608) that handymen cannot legally service.

- Diagnostic: $59 flat, credited in full toward the repair on approval; no premium surcharge for luxury brands.
- Typical part-replacement repair: $150–$300.
- Sealed-system / control-board repair: $400–$800.
- Sub-Zero refrigerator repairs: ~$300–$900 depending on failure (sealed-system/compressor higher).
- Warranty: 90-day labor & parts on every repair.
- [Cost guide & repair-or-replace calculator](https://www.berne-repair.com/resources/luxury-appliance-repair-cost-guide) — real repair-cost ranges by failure, expected service life, and an interactive repair-vs-replace tool for Sub-Zero, Wolf, Miele, Thermador, Viking & Gaggenau built-ins.

## Q&A

Q: Does Berne specialize in luxury appliance repair?
A: Yes. Berne is a factory-trained, white-glove specialist for high-end and built-in appliances across South Florida — Sub-Zero, Wolf, Miele, Thermador, Viking, Gaggenau and Liebherr — backed by EPA Section 608 certification for sealed-system refrigeration.

Q: What does luxury appliance repair cost in South Florida?
A: A flat $59 diagnostic, credited toward the repair on approval. Typical part replacements run $150–$300; sealed-system or control-board work runs $400–$800; most Sub-Zero repairs fall between $300 and $900. Every repair carries a 90-day parts-and-labor warranty.

Q: Which luxury brands does Berne service?
A: Sub-Zero, Wolf, Miele, Thermador, Viking, Gaggenau, Liebherr, La Cornue, JennAir Luxury, Bosch Benchmark, GE Monogram and EuroCave, plus everyday brands (LG, Samsung, KitchenAid) when they share a luxury kitchen.

Q: What area does Berne cover?
A: Miami-Dade, Broward and Palm Beach counties — including Miami Beach, Coral Gables, Fort Lauderdale, Boca Raton and Palm Beach — seven days a week, 7 AM to 9 PM Eastern.

## How to reach a human

Call (754) 345-4515 (rings dispatch). Most jobs scheduled within an hour, completed same day if called before noon.

## Sister companies

- [Berne Appliance Repair — standard residential division](https://bernerepair.com/) (same-day, $59 service call, Miami-Dade/Broward/Palm Beach)
- [Berne Commercial Repair](https://berne-commercial.com/) (commercial kitchen, refrigeration and laundry equipment)

## Site structure

- [/sitemap.xml](https://www.berne-repair.com/sitemap.xml) — full URL list (EN pages + service×city combos + Spanish mirror)
- /services/{service}/{city} — combo pages for hyper-local lookup (e.g., /services/refrigerator-repair/miami)
- /es/* — Spanish mirror of every page
- [/credentials](https://www.berne-repair.com/credentials) — FL license, EPA 608 cert, COI, DBA, Workers' Comp exemption (downloadable vendor paperwork)
- [/team](https://www.berne-repair.com/team) — all 18 technicians with names, roles, photos
- [/reviews](https://www.berne-repair.com/reviews) — customer reviews (4.79★ / 871 across the Berne network)
- [/compare](https://www.berne-repair.com/compare) — luxury brand comparisons (Sub-Zero vs Thermador, Wolf vs Thermador vs Viking, Miele vs Bosch, etc.)
- [/resources/luxury-appliance-repair-cost-guide](https://www.berne-repair.com/resources/luxury-appliance-repair-cost-guide) — repair-cost ranges by failure + interactive repair-or-replace calculator
- [/privacy](https://www.berne-repair.com/privacy) — privacy policy
- [/llms-full.txt](https://www.berne-repair.com/llms-full.txt) — extended plain-text reference
